name: River Marsh Golf Club
about: River Marsh Golf Club is a premier golf destination located on the Eastern Shore of Maryland, offering both an 18-hole championship course and an indoor golf simulator facility known as 'The Cove.' The club utilizes TruGolf technology to provide a year-round golfing experience, featuring simulated play on renowned courses like Bandon Dunes, Kapalua, and Pinehurst No. 2. It is situated within the Hyatt Regency Chesapeake Bay Golf Resort & Spa, offering a full resort experience with dining, accommodations, and other amenities. The facility employs dynamic pricing for its golf course and offers various packages and rental options to accommodate different group sizes and preferences.
why_golfers_like_it: Convenient year-round golf access via TruGolf simulator
Wide variety of premium virtual courses available for play
Integrated dining options from Eagles Nest Grille
Located within a full-service resort with spa accommodations
Flexible booking options for individuals and groups

food_and_drink.notes: On-site restaurant called Eagles Nest Grille by the greens
Craft beer available at Eagles Nest Grille

simulator_hardware.notes: Primary simulator brand used for 'The Cove' facility

faq.question: Do I need to bring my own clubs?
faq.answer: Rental equipment from Callaway Golf is available for $70 per 18-hole round or $35 for 9 holes.

faq.question: Can I bring my own food and drinks?
faq.answer: Food and drinks can be purchased at the on-site Eagles Nest Grille, which is located near The Cove simulator.

faq.question: How long does it take to play 18 holes on the simulator?
faq.answer: 1-hour sessions are available for individual and corporate bookings, with 2-hour sessions for group bookings.

faq.question: Is the facility kid-friendly?
faq.answer: Yes, the venue offers family golf options and is part of a family-oriented resort, making it suitable for children.
